'''favasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cnida|cnida]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cnida|cnida]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| favasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fævæsæth|fævæsæth]] || [[word:fævæsæj|fævæsæj]] || [[word:fævæsæsh|fævæsæsh]] || [[word:fævæsæ|fævæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:favavasath|favavasath]] || [[word:favavasaj|favavasaj]] || [[word:favavasash|favavasash]] || [[word:favavasa|favavasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:favasath|favasath]] || [[word:favasaj|favasaj]] || [[word:favasash|favasash]] || [[word:favasa|favasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:favafsath|favafsath]] || [[word:favafsaj|favafsaj]] || [[word:favafsash|favafsash]] || [[word:favafsaf|favafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:favasatha|favasatha]] || [[word:favasaja|favasaja]] || [[word:favasasha|favasasha]] || [[word:favasaka|favasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:favasath|favasath]] || [[word:favasaj|favasaj]] || [[word:favasash|favasash]] || [[word:favasa|favasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:favasathal|favasathal]] || [[word:favasajal|favasajal]] || [[word:favasashal|favasashal]] || [[word:favasakal|favasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:favasathatha|favasathatha]] || [[word:favasajaja|favasajaja]] || [[word:favasashasha|favasashasha]] || [[word:favasaka|favasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:favasathan|favasathan]] || [[word:favasajan|favasajan]] || [[word:favasashan|favasashan]] || [[word:favasakan|favasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:favasathaoro|favasathaoro]] || [[word:favasajaoro|favasajaoro]] || [[word:favasashaoro|favasashaoro]] || [[word:favasakaoro|favasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
